title: How to Steal Customers From Giants 600x Bigger than Your Startup | Pigment, Eléonore Crespo
summary: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, discusses how to compete with much larger enterprise software vendors by building a full platform rather than single features, gaining trust through high-profile customer validation, and maintaining hiring standards. Pigment consolidates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data for strategic decision-making.
writeup: Eléonore Crespo, co-founder of Pigment, lays out how a startup competes against enterprise software vendors many times its size. The strategy centers on building a full platform instead of a single feature, earning trust through high-profile customer validation, and holding hiring standards. Pigment consolidates finance, supply chain, HR, and sales data to support strategic decision-making, which frames the platform-over-feature argument. The discussion also touches outbound sales and pricing strategy.
